message:
audit: batch 389 — timer wheel (2169L), compress (FIXED), macaroon auth, symbol pool, negotiate, quorum/DNS — all SOUND

Deep audits:
- time/wheel.rs (2169L): timer drift, lost timers, skip optimization,
  cascade correctness, cancellation (generation-based), wrap-around — SOUND
- http/compress.rs: double-finish bug FIXED (separate commit 0d693769),
  flush deferral, chunked state, memory growth, identity — SOUND
- cx/macaroon.rs: recursive discharge with cycle detection, HMAC chain,
  preallocation DoS cap, stack depth — SOUND
- types/resource.rs + util/resource.rs: buffer zeroing before pool return,
  all dealloc paths covered, not compiler-elided — SOUND
- raptorq/pipeline.rs: per-block repair counts, pool sizing — SOUND
- web/debug.rs: RAII connection guard, no TOCTOU — SOUND
- web/negotiate.rs: specificity ranking, q=0 rejection, RFC 7231 — SOUND
- combinator/quorum.rs: quorum(0,N) identity — SOUND
- net/dns/resolver.rs: trailing dot strip — SOUND
- runtime/env_config.rs: governor_interval clamped at two levels — SOUND

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
